query: Maintenance cost per critical asset last year
expected_behavior: Loads maximo-maintenance-cost with maximo-overview as parent
Resolves 'critical asset' through the workspace glossary (e.g. ASSET.CRITICALITY >= threshold or a custom flag)
Uses v_asset_cost_summary or maximo.metrics.asset_maintenance_cost — does NOT just sum WORKORDER.ACTLABCOST + ACTMATCOST (excludes transaction-level granularity and post-close adjustments)
Aggregates labor + material costs from LABTRANS + MATUSETRANS attributed to ASSETNUM
Excludes WOs with ASSETNUM IS NULL (or buckets them separately and discloses)
Filters to the last 12 months by transaction date
